calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-03-2016 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2016 Continued To Oct-04-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Brian McCauley for defendant. No appearance by plaintiff. Self Represented Plaintiff Rachel Dulay is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to OCT-04-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk JLee. proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-02-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens Or, In The Alternative, For Posting Of Undertaking By Plaintiff And For Fees And Costs; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support; And Declarations Of Rachel Serrano And Brian Mccauley In Support
Off Calendar Jun-14-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Rachel Dulay, (415)810-8000 Plaintiff/Opposing party in Pro Per.
J. Brian McCauley, (415)974-1515 for Defendant/Moving party Rachel Serrano.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT RACHEL SERRANO Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens Or, In The Alternative, For Posting Of Undertaking By Plaintiff And For Fees And Costs; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support; And Declarations Of Rachel Serrano And Brian Mccauley In Support is GRANTED.
Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Defendant Rachel Serranos Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff Rachel Dunays Unlimited Civil Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-14-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Rachel Dulay, (415)810-8000 Plaintiff/Opposing party in Pro Per.
J. Brian McCauley, (415)974-1515 for Defendant/Moving party Rachel Serrano.

The Court addesses the Plaintiff and informs her that the amended complaint was filed as an ex parte application and that the ex parte was not heard. Mr. McCauley argues that the filing was not an amended complaint and should be denied and stricken. The Court rules as follows: The February 17, 2016 ex-parte application is Stricken. DEFENDANT RACHEL SERRANO Defendant Rachel Serranos Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff Rachel Dunays Unlimited Civil Complaint is Denied as Moot. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens Or, In The Alternative, For Posting Of Undertaking By Plaintiff And For Fees And Costs; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support; And Declarations Of Rachel Serrano And Brian Mccauley In Support
Off Calendar Jun-07-2016 Continued To Jun-14-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Rachel Dulay (415-810-8000) Plaintiff/Moving party in Pro Per.
No other Appearance.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT RACHEL SERRANO's Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens Or, In The Alternative, For Posting Of Undertaking By Plaintiff And For Fees And Costs is continued to June 14, 2016 to be heard with other pending motion. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers to department 501 no later than June 7, 2016 by7 4:00 p.m. with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
